name: Montnets Cloud Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Montnets Cloud Technology Group Co., Ltd. operates as a mobile Internet operating support service provider in China and internationally. It operates operations support platform for various B2C applications of mobile Internet, as well as offers mobile instant messaging services, such as SMS and MMS for enterprises. The company also provides mobile smart traffic services; and operates an audio/video communication service cloud platform enabling enterprises to implement communication capabilities based on mobile Internet audio and video platform. In addition, it offers B2C unified communication cloud platform, a PaaS platform to help corporate customers obtain the B2C communication service capability; enterprise mobile platform, a communication gateway system for front-end access; and short message captcha for member verification, order notification, payment confirmation, logistics notification, and other triggering SMS applications. Further, the company provides mobile information code application platform; SMS notification; enterprise yellow page; Nova information processing platform for corporate customers; Tongzhiwang, a software product with notification; and audio captcha services. Additionally, it offers Montnets video cloud, a real-time communication platform; Montnets Cloud Broadcast, a vertical SaaS product; wisdom IoT cloud platform; and IoT 4G/3G/2G cards. The company was formerly known as Montnets Rongxin Technology Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Montnets Cloud Technology Group Co., Ltd. in November 2020. Montnets Cloud Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
